prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
The text of Item "3. Legal Proceedings" ENDS somewhere on this page; the next section is "Item 4. Mine Safety Disclosures".
Find where Item 3 ends: right before the "Item 4" heading if that heading appears on this page, otherwise at the very bottom of the page.
Transcribe VERBATIM the 5 lines of Item 3 that come immediately BEFORE that ending point (its final lines). Give the running prose closest to the end — do NOT transcribe lines from the top or middle of the page, and do NOT transcribe a data table or figure; if the very end is a table, give the prose just before it. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
Federal Trade Commission and State Attorneys General Driver Performance Litigation: Federal Trade Commission, et al. v. Walmart Inc.,
N.D. Cal., 2/26/26.
Mexico Antitrust Matter: Comisión Federal de Competencia Económica de México, Investigative Inquiry v. Nova Wal-Mart de México, S.de
R.L. de C.V. (Docket IO-002-2020, consolidated with Docket OE-026-2020), Mexico, 10/6/23.
India Antitrust Matter: Competition Commission of India, Case No. 40 of 2019, order initiating investigation 1/13/20.
